runs.summary: Memory index updated — new Meta domain (wiki-thinker) added, 1 new scheduled task noted, 1 new open thread
content: Added new scheduled task wiki-thinker to the Scheduled Maintenance table, noting its first run occurred 2026-07-05 (same day as creation, ahead of its 2026-07-06 schedule)
Added a new 'Meta' row to Domain Content Status summarizing wiki/cross-domain-themes.md and the wiki-thinker task's first-run output (2 investigation ideas, 2 cross-domain connections)

Added a new Open Threads entry pointing to the 4 unactioned items surfaced by wiki-thinker's first run (creatine dosing gap, Learning/Finance framework cross-link, Books/Finance fraud-memoir cross-link, AI-capex-bubble thesis not extended to Crypto), with a note to check wiki/cross-domain-themes.md directly going forward rather than duplicating detail in memory
No open threads were resolved this run
Appended scheduled-task log line to log.md for 2026-07-05
